description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a medium build, standing with arms slightly outstretched. The person is wearing a short-sleeved, loose-fitting shirt and long pants, both of which have a smooth, matte appearance. The figure has short, neatly styled hair and is wearing large, rectangular eyeglasses. The feet are bare, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. The facial features are simplified but expressive, and the overall form is proportionate and human-like. The clothing and accessories suggest a casual, everyday urban context.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian with short hair, eyeglasses, a short-sleeved shirt, long pants, and bare feet, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, eyeglasses, shirt neckline, and relaxed arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, glasses, and the side seam of the shirt and pants.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, glasses, and the side of the body.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt and long pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
